metadata.description: Research Agora - A plugin marketplace for Claude Code focused on ML research, academic writing, and development automation

plugins.name: academic
plugins.description: Academic paper writing skills for ML conferences (NeurIPS, ICML, ICLR, AAAI). Includes skills for introductions, abstracts, experiments, literature reviews, rebuttals, and more.

plugins.name: development
plugins.description: Development automation skills for Python projects. Includes commit, PR automation, CI/CD setup, documentation, and code simplification.

plugins.name: formatting
plugins.description: Document and LaTeX formatting skills for publication-quality output. Includes LaTeX consistency, publication figures, and TikZ diagrams.

plugins.name: office
plugins.description: Microsoft Office document creation skills. Create and edit PowerPoint, Word, and Excel files programmatically.

plugins.name: research-agents
plugins.description: Specialized research analysis agents for critical thinking, evidence verification, perspective synthesis, and paper quality improvement.
